[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 100000111 4
2 101000101 4
3 101110000 4
4 111101111 8
5 011110000 4
6 110000101 4
7 011011110 6

12 21 101000000 2
23 32 101100000 3
34 43 011100000 3
45 54 010000000 1
56 65 010000100 2
67 76 011001000 3
70 07 000000000 a match 0

02 20 100000000 1

24 42 001110000 3
35 53 110000101 4 match 6

60 06 000000110 2
71 17 001000000 1
